free_text: Improved experimental test of detailed balance and
time reversibility in the reactions Al-27+p<->Mg-24+a.
For the detection of alpha particles and
protons Si surface barrier detectors of 100 and 500
mu-m, were employed and placed at 177.61 and 177.56
degr., respectively, in order to have the same mean
center of mass angle for both reactions.
